data.title: Elevate Holistics supports US veterans with medical cannabis access due to major legislative progress in 2025. CEO Aspen Noonan emphasizes commitment.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma on October 23, 2025, Elevate Holistics, a telehealth service offering supervised access to medical cannabis, has declared its continued dedication to supporting American veterans. The company emphasizes the significance of recent legislative changes and usage patterns in 2025 that highlight a pressing demand for their services. Elevate Holistics aims to address this need by...

data.title: Healthpeak Properties (NYSE: DOC) reports Q3 2025 results, highlighting strong cash re-leasing spreads due to growing outpatient demand.
data.description: In Denver, Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC), a prominent real estate owner focused on healthcare services, has released its strategic initiatives update and quarterly results for the period ending September 30, 2025. The company highlighted that the demand for outpatient medical services is surpassing the rate of new supply, contributing to robust cash re-leasing spreads. Healthpeak attributes this success to its strong platform and extensive relationships within the health system sector.

data.title: DHI Group, Inc. will report Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 10, 2025 after market close. Conference call at 5:00pm ET.
data.description: DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) will release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on November 10, 2025, after the market closes. President and CEO Art Zeile, and CFO Greg Schippers, will conduct a conference call and webcast at 5:00pm Eastern time on the same day to review the outcomes. The official press release containing the details will be issued subsequent to the market close.

data.title: EVERTEC declares $0.05 quarterly dividend on common stock on October 23, 2025 to be paid on December 5, 2025.
data.description: In Puerto Rico, EVERTEC, Inc. (NYSE: EVTC) declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share on October 23, 2025. This dividend will be paid on December 5, 2025, to stockholders of record as of November 3, 2025. The Board of Directors of EVERTEC stated they expect to continue declaring this dividend regularly in future quarters, pending approval, and may be subject to adjustments based on business performance.

data.title: Medical Properties Trust will host a conference call and webcast on Oct 30, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss third quarter financial results.
data.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--Medical Properties Trust, Inc. (NYSE: MPW) revealed plans for a conference call and webcast on October 30, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET to address the firm’s third quarter financial performance. The third quarter results will be disclosed before the market opens on the same day. To join the call, dial 800-715-9871 (North America) or 646-307-1963 (International).

data.title: JBG SMITH (JBGS) declares $0.175 quarterly common dividend per share, payable on Nov 20, 2025 to shareholders of record as of Nov 6, 2025.
data.description: JBG SMITH, a prominent owner and developer of mixed-use properties in the Washington, DC area, disclosed that its Board of Trustees has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.175 per common share. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on November 20, 2025, to common shareholders on record as of November 6, 2025. Specializing in mixed-use properties within Metro-served submarkets, JBG SMITH focuses on amenity-rich locations.

data.title: Equity Residential issues 2025 Corporate Responsibility report, focusing on sustainability and community service.
data.description: Equity Residential, a prominent company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol EQR, based in Chicago, has disclosed its 2025 Corporate Responsibility report, emphasizing its dedication to corporate responsibility. The report delves into the firm's initiatives regarding sustainability, employee growth, customer relations, community involvement, and governance. It highlights the company's objectives and accomplishments in these sectors. The company articulates its mission to foster thriving communities.

data.title: Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AOMR) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, conference call at 8:30 am ET.
data.description: Atlanta-based Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AOMR), a prominent real estate finance firm specializing in acquiring first lien non-QM loans and other mortgage-related assets in the U.S. market, disclosed plans to unveil their Q3 2025 financial results on November 6, 2025. The company will release the data prior to market opening and conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. This announcement was made in a press release on Business Wire.

data.title: Hyperliquid Strategies plans $1B IPO to expand HYPE token portfolio, advised by Chardan Capital Markets for institutional growth.
data.description: A $1 billion initial public offering (IPO) is being planned by Hyperliquid Strategies Inc. to strengthen its holdings of the HYPE token, with guidance from Chardan Capital Markets. The primary goal of this endeavor is to increase institutional backing and foster growth within the ecosystem.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges HSII, VMEO shareholders to discuss rights; contact firm promptly. Investigation ongoing.
data.description: Investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York City, has initiated investigations into several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws. Shareholders are urged to get in touch with the firm promptly as there might be a restricted timeframe to pursue their rights. The announcement was made on October 23, 2025. If you own stocks in the companies being looked into, it is advisable to contact Halper Sadeh LLC without delay.

data.title: BeFra reports Q3 2025 results in Mexico, figures in nominal Mexican Pesos, following IFRS guidelines. President/CEO happy with solid performance.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE:BWMX) shared its Q3 2025 financial outcomes. All numbers are in nominal Mexican Pesos (Ps.) unless specified, following IFRS guidelines and subject to minor variations due to rounding. The report, approved by the Board of Directors, highlighted the President and CEO's positive message on BeFra's strong performance.

data.description: Merger forms top community banking franchise in the Upper Midwest region. The newly combined entity will serve a total of [number] communities across [number] states.

data.title: Archrock declares $0.21 per share quarterly dividend, $0.84 annually - payable on Nov 13, 2025 to stockholders of record.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Archrock, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.21 per common stock share, totaling $0.84 per share annually. The dividend for the third quarter of 2025 is set to be distributed on November 13, 2025. This dividend is available to all stockholders recorded as such by November 4, 2025. Archrock, Inc. is listed as AROC on the NYSE.

data.title: Tesla shareholders voting on Musk's $900 billion pay plan, facing opposition from "Take Back Tesla" movement.
data.description: Tesla Inc may face challenges as shareholders meet on Nov. 6 to vote on CEO Elon Musk's new pay package, with a group known as "Take Back Tesla" urging shareholders to vote against it. The proposed pay package could be valued at up to $900 billion and requires Musk to be with Tesla for 10 years and meet certain milestones to receive the full amount. Critics argue that this is excessive, with Musk potentially becoming the first trillionaire and receiving an average annual compensation of almost $100 billion. The movement aims to mobilize union members and public interest groups to influence the vote. Musk's compensation plan is being scrutinized for its extravagance in comparison to his peers.

data.title: Boston Scientific beats Q3 revenue estimate with $5.07B and adjusted earnings of 75 cents. Expects 20% net sales growth in 2025.
data.description: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) announced on Wednesday their third-quarter 2025 revenues reached $5.07 billion, surpassing the estimated $4.97 billion. The company reported adjusted earnings of 75 cents, beating the consensus of 71 cents and their own guidance of 70-72 cents. Looking ahead, Boston Scientific projects a net sales growth of about 20% for 2025 on a reported basis and approximately 15.5% organically, exceeding prior estimates of 18%-19% and 12%-14% respectively. They anticipate fourth-quarter adjusted earnings between 77 and 79 cents, higher than the consensus of 76 cents. Sales for the upcoming quarter are predicted to fall between $5.22 billion and $5.31 billion.

data.title: MidWestOne Financial Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOFG) reports financial results for Q3 2025 in Iowa City on Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: In Iowa City, Iowa, on October 23, 2025, MidWest One Financial Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOFG) disclosed their third-quarter 2025 financial outcomes.

data.title: World Kinect Corp (NYSE: WKC) Q3 2025 Results: Gross profit $250M, net income $26M, EBITDA $94M, operating cash flow $116M.
data.description: In Miami, World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) disclosed its third-quarter 2025 financial outcomes. Key figures for the quarter include a gross profit of $250 million, GAAP net income of $26 million (equivalent to $0.46 per diluted share), and adjusted net income of $30 million (or $0.54 per diluted share). The company delivered an adjusted EBITDA of $94 million and produced $116 million in operating cash flow, with free cash flow standing at $102 million. In terms of year-over-year segment profitability, the Aviation sector saw a notable increase with a gross profit of $143 million.

data.title: Net Power Inc. (NYSE: NPWR) to release Q3 2025 update on Nov 13, with conference call on Nov 14 at 8:30 AM ET. Contact 877-407-8014 (domestic) or +1 201-689-8053 (international) to participate. Visit ir.netpower.com for webcast.
data.description: Net Power Inc. (NYSE: NPWR) intends to release its third quarter 2025 business update post the market closure on Thursday, November 13, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for Friday, November 14, 2025, commencing at 8:30 AM ET. You can access the live audio webcast of the call via Net Power’s investor relations website at ir.netpower.com. For phone participation, dial 877-407-8014 (domestic) or +1 201-689-8053 (international). A recorded webcast will be available afterwards.

data.title: Universal Display Corp announces recipient of inaugural Sherwin I. Seligsohn Innovation Award in Organic Electronics. #OLED
data.description: Ewing, New Jersey - Universal Display Corporation revealed the winner of the first-ever Sherwin I. Seligsohn Innovation Award. The award recognizes outstanding achievements in innovation within the corporation and the recipient was announced today.

data.title: Federated Hermes to acquire majority stake in FCP Fund Manager with $3.8 billion client assets, expands real estate capabilities in U.S. markets.
data.description: Federated Hermes has reaffirmed its dedication to enhancing its private markets and alternatives investment offerings, with a specific focus on expanding in the United States. This move will see an expansion of Federated Hermes' real estate capabilities into key U.S. markets, complementing its existing business in the United Kingdom. This strategic initiative aims to bolster FCP's foothold in these markets, signaling a significant development in the company's investment and growth plans.
